title: Locum Nursery Teacher Assistant (International School Setting) #HGA
description:
Job Scope:

  • Provide nurturing pastoral care and ensure students’ safety and well-being at all times.
  • Support students’ social, emotional, and behavioural development in line with school policies.
  • Engage children in meaningful play and learning experiences that promote language, curiosity, and holistic development.
  • Collaborate with teachers to plan, deliver, and review developmentally appropriate lessons.
  • Observe students and provide constructive feedback to teaching staff.
  • Assist with daily classroom routines, transitions, and organisation.
  • Prepare and maintain learning materials and classroom resources.
  • Help create and maintain a welcoming, engaging, and well-organised learning environment.
  • Communicate effectively with teachers, colleagues, and parents on educational and pastoral matters.
  • Administer basic first aid and report health or safety concerns promptly.
  • Contribute to wider school activities and support additional duties when required.
  • Participate actively in team meetings, training, and ongoing professional development.

Requirements:

  • A minimum of a relevant Early Childhood Care & Education (ECCE) qualification (L2/L3 or equivalent).
  • Prior experience supporting children aged 2–3 years, preferably in an international or British curriculum setting.

Interested candidates can write in to Ann at anngoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Ann Goh Xin Ting
R1875289

Recruit Express Pte Ltd
E.A License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
